data.title: Simplicity
data.description: Commitment to creating intuitive products with minimal complexity.

data.title: Innovation
data.description: A culture of constant innovation and embracing new technology.
data.technical_spec: Strong research and development teams, beta testing environments.

data.title: Reliability
data.description: Focus on creating highly reliable and available services.
data.technical_spec: SLA commitments, robust disaster recovery plans.

data.title: Scalability
data.description: Design systems to efficiently handle increasing loads.
data.technical_spec: Horizontal scaling techniques, elastic resource allocation.

data.title: User Privacy
data.description: Strong emphasis on user data protection and privacy rights.
